title: rosa × collina var. megalantha
intro: Rosa × collina var. megalantha, also known as the hybrid rose, is a plant species that is a cross between Rosa rugosa and Rosa acicularis. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa × collina var. megalantha include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rosa × collina var. megalantha can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues.
